title: Europe needs a new framework to face energy challenges
summary_full: If we want to enhance our competitiveness and sovereignty we need to accelerate that agenda. Spain is ready to lead this effort, because our ‘gold’ is not black – it is green
summary_public: If we want to enhance our competitiveness and sovereignty we need to accelerate that agenda. Spain is ready to lead this effort, because our ‘gold’ is not black – it is green

ES.label: positive
ES.evidence: Spain is ready to lead this effort, because our ‘gold’ is not black
